title: Malum - Arma
description: An addon for the Malum mod focused around combat-oriented things.
body:
# A Magecraft of War
Malum Arma is an addon mod for the Malum Mod.

Currently, it adds a new type of weapon, Runic Alloy Weapons, but a lot more is planned for the future
 
## Runic Weaponry
![A set of 5 Runic Weapons on pedestals.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b1a886c1d37e8379ae9dd8b8525dd86ebab0a94.png)

(Sword, Greatsword, Glaive, Hatchet, Greataxe)

A new family of weapons, Fashioned from Runic Alloy, a new material, Runic Weapons have Rune Slots on them, which allow any rune to be socketed into them, granting the weapon various effects depending on the rune.

You'll have to experiment and see what builds you can make, as I'm definitely not writing every effect here!

**Arma Runes**
![A set of 4 Arma Runes on pedestals, with one extra empty pedestal.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3173eacfd0d181f45cb56d5fee766f0df604a88.png)

( Mana Redirection, Spatial Carving, Opposing, Soul Gashing )

To go with the new weapons, a new set of runes is also added! Arma Runes, also made from Runic Alloy, grant your runic weapons an ability, however each one has a unique drawback to it.

You can only fit one per weapon, so choose wisely!

 
## Credits & stuff

 

ApacheHC - Coding & concepts

Drown3d - Pixel Art for all the items, effects, and most of the blocks

My_life101 - Sound design for all sound effects in the mod

Flowerism - Textures for some of the contributor plushies

Est / Emett - Logo

SammySemicolon - Feedback, help, & the Malum mod

Hrzx - Bugtesting & Feedback

 

Arma is my first mod, so some things may not be the best, If you have any feedback, would like to report a bug, or want to say anything to me, then please ping me on the [Lodestar](https://discord.gg/4J2ZM6T8nT) Discord or dm me @apache.helicopter! I'm always open to talking about Arma or listening to feedback
